page_metadata.biotools__summary:
The biological network mining workflow identifies frequent structural patterns in biochemical reaction networks encoded in the Systems Biology Markup Language (SBML).

The repository contains the scripts for a workflow that identifies frequent structural patterns in biochemical reaction networks encoded in the Systems Biology Markup Language.
